subcodes.first_line: O Hájí Bábá! Upon thee be the glory of Bahá'u'lláh, the Lord of Names! The Greater Branch is at this moment present before His face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاجی بابا علیک بهاءالله مولی الاسماء غصن اکبر در این حین تلقاء وجه حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
